headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Consumer Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investors seek dividend-yielding stocks during market turbulence. Benzinga provides latest analyst ratings and accuracy data for high-yielding stocks in the consumer discretionary sector. Macy's, Genuine Parts Co, and Harley-Davidson are analyzed by top analysts.
